ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "item_number" TEXT /* Item number of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used in the product */,
  "manufacturing_date" TEXT /* Date the product was manufactured */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the product (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum storage capacity of the warehouse */,
  "manager" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse manager */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the warehouse */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the warehouse */,
  "storage_type" TEXT /* Type of storage (e.g., pallets, shelves) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being tracked */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse where the product is stored */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the product in stock */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the quantity (e.g., pieces, units) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the inventory was last updated */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "critical_level" INTEGER /* Critical level for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_dimensions" (
  "dimension_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product dimension entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being described */,
  "rows" INTEGER /* Number of rows in the product */,
  "columns" INTEGER /* Number of columns in the product */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the product */,
  "width" TEXT /* Width of the product */,
  "depth" TEXT /* Depth of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dimension_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_dimensions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product feature entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being described */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (e.g., cardholder, write-on) */,
  "feature_value" TEXT /* Value of the feature (e.g., 400, 50) */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the feature */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of feature (e.g., physical, functional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_features_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product being ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "ship_to_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipments" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being shipped */,
  "shipment_date" TEXT /* Date the shipment was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the shipment (e.g., pending, shipped) */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method of shipping (e.g., air, sea, road) */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., inventory manager, warehouse staff) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Active status of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
